scripts.coverage:merge: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('coverage/coverage-final.json')) { fs.mkdirSync('.nyc_output', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('coverage/coverage-final.json', '.nyc_output/coverage-jest.json'); }"
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run coverage:clean && jest --coverage && cross-env VITE_COVERAGE=true pnpm run at && pnpm run coverage:merge && pnpm run coverage:report
